usbhost_begin.message0: USB Host begin halt on error %1
usbhost_begin.tooltip: Create USB object, initialize host shield, and add Usb.Task() to loop.

usbhost_ps4_begin.message0: USB Host PS4 controller begin halt on error %1
usbhost_ps4_begin.tooltip: Create PS4USB controller object and initialize USB host.

usbhost_ps4_connected.tooltip: Return true when a PS4 controller is connected.

usbhost_ps4_button.tooltip: Read a PS4 button click or pressed state.

usbhost_ps4_hat.tooltip: Read a PS4 analog stick axis.

usbhost_ps4_rumble.message0: USB Host PS4 rumble low %1 high %2
